Operation 'post_oauth2_token' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is vague about authentication requirements and return value. Added clarity on supported user types, required inputs (client credentials), response structure (AccessToken schema), and how the token is used. This helps AI agents understand the complete token generation flow and when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve access token for a known/anonymous user.
data.description_suggestion: Generates an OAuth2 access token for authentication. Supports both known users (with credentials) and anonymous users. Requires client credentials (Client key and Client secret) for authentication. Returns an AccessToken object containing the token, expiration time, and token type. The generated token can be used for subsequent API requests via Bearer authentication.
data.reasoning: Current description is vague about authentication requirements and return value. Added clarity on supported user types, required inputs (client credentials), response structure (AccessToken schema), and how the token is used. This helps AI agents understand the complete token generation flow and when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'post_oauth2_info' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks specificity about authentication method, return structure, and use cases. Enhanced with Bearer token requirement, reference to UserInfo schema, and clarification that this operation validates token validity. Helps AI agents understand this is a token validation and user data retrieval operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve user informations associated to a given access token .
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves user information associated with a provided access token. Requires Bearer token authentication. Returns a UserInfo object containing user profile data (up to 20 properties including identity, contact, and preference information). Use this operation to validate token validity and fetch authenticated user details.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about authentication method, return structure, and use cases. Enhanced with Bearer token requirement, reference to UserInfo schema, and clarification that this operation validates token validity. Helps AI agents understand this is a token validation and user data retrieval operation.

message: Operation 'post_oauth2_revoke' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks context about authentication requirements and side effects. Added Bearer token requirement, explicit statement about token invalidation and rejection of future requests, and use case examples (logout, security). This clarifies the operation's impact and helps AI agents understand when to invoke token revocation.

data.current_description: Explicitly remove access token from DbSecure.
data.description_suggestion: Revokes an access token, invalidating it for future API requests. Requires Bearer token authentication. After revocation, the token cannot be used for authentication and subsequent requests using this token will be rejected. This operation is typically used for logout or security purposes when token access is no longer needed.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks context about authentication requirements and side effects. Added Bearer token requirement, explicit statement about token invalidation and rejection of future requests, and use case examples (logout, security). This clarifies the operation's impact and helps AI agents understand when to invoke token revocation.
